# Ronja Tittel

# 📝 **Bio**

------------------------------------------------------------------------

Hey! :D

My name is Ronja Tittel, and I had the opportunity to stay with the Biogenies Team in Białystok for my practical semester as an Erasmus student.  
Currently, I am studying for my Bachelor’s degree in Biotechnology at Brandenburg University of Technology Cottbus-Senftenberg.

I am grateful for the opportunity to get to know everyone and to become a small part of the team.
